_comment: PYR3-023 BE 4K parity gate per-fixture thresholds (vs kotlin v1.1 SHOWCASE_4K JPGs). v0.20 (2026-05-28): expectedR rename (was baselineR — harmonized with the 19-fixture corpus schema from v0.19). tier added in v0.19. 4K thresholds use round(expectedR + 2.0) (JPG noise floor headroom). Calibrated 2026-05-27 from one v0.17 run; variance is sub-0.01 R at 3B-sample-class quality.

248.22289.notes: engine-precision-drift, not regression — GPU f32 vs CPU f64 in variation kernels; see PYR3-029 Phase 5/6 closure.
